Change 1: Replace:
  object_primary_predicates = {
              "leader": "is the leader of",
              "capital": "is the capital of",
              "currency": "uses the currency",
              "anthem": "has the anthem",
              "parentCompany": "is owned by",
              "location": "is located in",
              "governingBody": "is governed by",
              "leaderTitle": "holds the title",
              "country": "is a part of",
              "isPartOf": "is part of",
              "derivative": "is a form of",          # e.g., Synthpop is a form of House music
              "bandMember": "has band member",
              "musicFusionGenre": "is a music fusion genre of",
              "musicSubgenre": "is a music subgenre of",
              "stylisticOrigin": "has stylistic origin in"
          }
          for t in triples_here:
              if t.predicate in object_primary_predicates:
                  phr = object_primary_predicates[t.predicate]
                  # special handling for “derivative” to keep natural order
                  if t.predicate == "derivative":
                      parts.append(f"{t.object} {phr} {subj}")
                  else:
                      parts.append(f"{t.object} {phr} {subj}")
with:
  # Mapping of predicates to phrasing and direction.
          # direction = True  -> object first (object phr subject)
          # direction = False -> subject first (subject phr object)
          object_primary_predicates = {
              "leader": ("is the leader of", True),
              "capital": ("is the capital of", True),
              "currency": ("uses the currency", True),
              "anthem": ("has the anthem", True),
              "parentCompany": ("is owned by", True),
              "location": ("is located in", True),
              "governingBody": ("is governed by", True),
              "leaderTitle": ("holds the title", True),
              "country": ("is part of", False),          # Montevideo is part of Uruguay
              "isPartOf": ("is part of", False),         # Asunción is part of Gran Asunción
              "derivative": ("is a form of", True),      # e.g., Synthpop is a form of House music
              "bandMember": ("has band member", False),
              "musicFusionGenre": ("is a music fusion genre of", False),
              "musicSubgenre": ("is a music subgenre of", False),
              "stylisticOrigin": ("has stylistic origin in", False)
          }
          for t in triples_here:
              if t.predicate in object_primary_predicates:
                  phr, obj_first = object_primary_predicates[t.predicate]
                  if obj_first:
                      parts.append(f"{t.object} {phr} {subj}")
                  else:
                      parts.append(f"{subj} {phr} {t.object}")
